title: Jurassic Apocalypse
description: A dinosaur themed Modpack that challenges you to survive into a prehistoric world full of fierce predators that hunt you.
body:
![BH Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f7cbc62c6df82f94d0bd80762db8357ef16149.png)
💚**This Modpack is way better with you friends! Get 25% Off for First Month at [Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/blu25) using code: BLU25**

- **🦖Dinosaurs - Fierce predators that will try to kill you every time they appear.**
- **⚔️New Weapons - A big variety of weapons that can perfectly fit with your combat style.**
- **👑New Armors - If the basic armor becomes too boring for you, there are lots of new ones to craft.**
- **🌄Biomes - Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Unearthed Journey will give you new biomes to explore.**
- **🚽Furniture - Decorate your house / base with a high variety of furniture.**
- **🍖Food - Plenty to choose from.**
- **🌠Shaders - Horror / Apocalypse shaders included.**
- **👀Extra - Easy crafting with JEI and useful information with WTHIT.**
